fields.description:
*Problem background*

It is possible to create templates for Trados project package creation. This is important to work with automatic workflows. This button doesn't seem to work anymore.

*Site BM*

Order - Job - Job Modal - Specification - Create Trados Studio project package - Create new package template

*User*

internal

*PBM actual state*

When trying to create a package template, nothing happens after a click at this button.

*!image-2024-02-07-14-54-36-779.png!*

Logfile doesn't show an error. This function is also corrupted in Plunet 9.14.7

*PBM desired state*

After clicking at this button you should get another menu in order to enter a name ** 

*!image-2024-02-07-14-57-49-314.png!*
fields.summary: Button to create Trados project package templates does not work
fields.customfield_10121: Button to create Trados project package templates does not work

comments.body:
[~accountid:712020:7ba20746-20f1-4963-8f8a-468f0e119f13]  it seems so, this is the error in console

!image-2024-02-09-16-49-33-375.png!

Hello Julia,
    
    I have found 2 branches for this issue and created a merge request for each of them, 
    so that it can be merged accordingly.
    I've created 2 merge requests in total.
   
    Best regards - your Jira Script-API!
